data_in.description: Python 3 environment with pip package manager

data_out.description: Installation log confirming psims package installed successfully
Python import statement execution log confirming pyteomics.proforma module imported without error
Verification report confirming ProForma notation parsing functions are accessible in imported module

domain_knowledge: ProForma is a standardized notation for representing post-translational modifications and sequence variants in peptide sequences, and psims is the library that enables its parsing in Pyteomics.
psims is an optional conditional dependency; pyteomics.proforma module requires psims to be installed for full ProForma parsing capability.
Successful module import and attribute accessibility confirms the dependency chain is properly resolved and the proteomics data structure can be instantiated.

direct_checks: verify file exists: psims package installed and importable in Python environment
script_runs: execute `python -c 'from pyteomics.proforma import ProForma'` without error
output_matches_reference: confirm ProForma class or parsing function is accessible in pyteomics.proforma namespace
expert_review: Review whether ProForma notation parsing functionality is fully operational and not degraded by optional dependency wiring
Assess whether psims installation correctly resolves conditional dependency chain for proforma component

task_objective: Verify that installing psims enables import of pyteomics.proforma and confirm ProForma notation parsing functionality is accessible.
